CustomField.description: Displays the invoiced period start-date. Note that invoices for current month will not have value in InvoicePeriodStart__c, it's always calculated here. InvoicePeriodStart__c contains date for retroactive invoices.
CustomField.formula: IF( NOT(ISNULL(InvoicePeriodStart__c)), InvoicePeriodStart__c, IF( NOT(ISNULL(ExpirationDate__c)), DATE(YEAR(ExpirationDate__c) ,MONTH(ExpirationDate__c),1), null ) )
CustomField.label: Fakturaperiod start
